title: Figure 7 in Identification of candidate genes involved with dicamba resistance in waterhemp (Amoronthus tuberculotus) via transcriptomics analyses
author: Tranel, Patrick J.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 7. Temporal quantitative PCR results for (A) GST-nt, (B) ABC10, (C) PEROX12, and (D) GST-ct before and at multiple time points after dicamba treatment. Asterisks (*) indicate comparisons that were significant (t-test P-value <0.05), with error bars indicating variability across replicates.
steps_raw: Figure 7. Temporal quantitative PCR results for (A) GST-nt, (B) ABC10, (C) PEROX12, and (D) GST-ct before and at multiple time points after dicamba treatment. Asterisks (*) indicate comparisons that were significant (t-test P-value <0.05), with error bars indicating variability across replicates.
